creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
>  my previous objections and reasons for those objections to an eggdrop
>  port can be found in the PR system.

A search for "eggdrop" in GNATS turns up
http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=2241 and
http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=8285 .  Bill's comments are
attached to the latter.  Since then, an irc category has been added to the
ports collection.
-- 
Trevor Johnson
http://jpj.net/~trevor/gpgkey.txt
